reasoning: As of late October 2025, xAI's flagship model is Grok 4, which falls short of the top capabilities seen in leaders like OpenAI (o4/GPT-5), Anthropic (Claude 4.5), and Google (Gemini 2.5). Grok 5 training is only just beginning in October 2025 and will not be ready by October 31. Furthermore, in the event of a tie, xAI would lose to most major competitors (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI) due to alphabetical order tiebreaking. The market priced this at 1% on October 16, which strongly aligns with the evidence that xAI will not hold the top Chatbot Arena score on October 31, 2025.
batch_queries: Will xAI have the best AI model on October 31?
